strings.panel.p1.bubble.right.html: What have you done to Radd???
strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: He's under my power now, as a mere office flunkie.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.center.html: Don't waste your time, he's beyond help.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.right.html: Break free, Radd! Pound the buttons or something!
strings.panel.p4.bubble.center.html: "Pound the buttons?" What the hell does that mean?
